title: Linai Floats to Space
description: Linai drifts into the cosmos and encounters a rocket and an astronaut among the stars.

acts.approachText: Linai drifts through the inky black of space, her translucent body glowing softly with tiny internal sparkles as she takes in the endless starfield. Suddenly a massive rocket looms before her — engines cold, hull gleaming silver, blocking her path through the asteroid belt. Her eyes widen in a full surprise burst, particles scattering outward before gathering back. She tilts slightly, studying the rocket with curious, widened eyes, then tries three approaches: first she attempts to surge upward over the nose cone, but a slow spin of the rocket nudges her aside; next she tries to drift around the wide exhaust nozzle at the base, but a gentle thruster puff of residual gas pushes her back; finally she hovers still, eyes angling outward toward the viewer with a flat 'you see this?' expression, waiting for a choice.

choices.label: Phase through the rocket hull
choices.outcomeText: Linai dissolves her edges into a thin luminous mist and phases gently through the rocket's gleaming hull, her internal sparkles lighting up the dark interior for one magical beat before she re-forms on the other side, fully intact and glowing brighter than before. She pulses with delight, rising a little higher than necessary, trails lifting with buoyant looseness as the rocket drifts peacefully behind her.

choices.label: Pulse energy at the rocket
choices.outcomeText: Linai concentrates a bright pulse of energy at the rocket's side — but the vibration bounces back and rattles her own body like a wobbling soap bubble. She spins in a slow, undignified circle, eyes going comically wide and asymmetric, trails tangled, before she steadies herself with a sheepish internal flicker and settles back to try again.

acts.approachText: Floating just beyond the rocket, Linai discovers an astronaut drifting alone in the void — helmet visor reflecting the stars, tether line slack, arms gently outstretched. The astronaut seems lost, slowly rotating in place. Linai's body softens and expands with warmth, her internal patterns shifting to gentle swirls as she recognises someone who needs a friend. She drifts closer by degrees, pulled by curiosity and care at once. She tries to communicate: first she pulses a warm amber glow toward the visor, but the astronaut keeps rotating; then she expands her body into a large soft shape to catch their attention, but they drift right through her trailing vapor without noticing. Linai pauses, both eyes angling toward the viewer with a patient, expectant pulse — it is time to choose.

choices.label: Glow brightly inside the visor
choices.outcomeText: Linai streams forward and gently envelops the astronaut's helmet with a warm, radiant glow — her light filling the visor from the inside like a tiny sunrise. The astronaut stops rotating, visor brightening, and turns toward Linai's eyes. A beat of stillness passes between them, full and sincere. Linai's internal patterns bloom into soft sparkles and the astronaut gives a slow, delighted thumbs-up. Linai rises higher than necessary, trails lifting with pure buoyant joy, and the two drift side by side through the starfield as the episode closes on a warm, glowing tableau.

choices.label: Expand into a giant cloud shape
choices.outcomeText: Linai puffs herself up to an enormous cloud, filling half the visible space — but she overdoes it spectacularly, her body ballooning so wide that she accidentally bumps the astronaut's tether and sends them into a gentle, slow-motion spin. Linai deflates instantly, eyes going wide and apologetic, internal patterns flickering with embarrassed little zigzags. The astronaut spins peacefully, unharmed and apparently amused, while Linai contracts back to normal size and recollects herself with a determined, warm pulse before trying again.
